indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting for screen work
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient and does not provide task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: high-traffic kitchen layout
indicators.rationale: The kitchen layout is open and high-traffic, making it unsuitable for focused solo work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and dedicated lighting for screen work make it challenging to set up a productive workstation. Additionally, the high-traffic kitchen layout further undermines the suitability for focused solo work.
